title: Skit Utilities
body:
Skit Utilities

Adds props for Minecraft skits.

As in props...

These are not functional so you are pretending.

Environments

Client - Required
Server - Required

What props this mod adds

Adds Camera
Adds Laptop
Adds Green Screen

Optional Mods

Freecam [by hashalite]. Useful for Minecraft movies 'n' stuff
EffectMC [by MoSadie] - I don't know what this mod does, it spawns effects though
